\tzpentry{ID4034}{Coupling Constant Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4034 introduces Coupling Constant Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \alpha_T = \frac{\Delta \theta_{\text{exp}}}{\Delta \theta_{\text{wake}}} = \frac{37.30^\circ}{42.99^\circ} \approx 0.867 \end{equation}
